subject: Staraptor — a large bird Pokemon with swept-back plumage and bold markings, wings extended in flight
description: A large raptor-type bird Pokemon swoops dynamically through the air, wings spread wide and angled for speed. The bird has bold dark plumage — primarily dark grey and black with a white facial marking and a prominent swept-back crest. A red spot is visible near the eye area. The pose conveys power and momentum, with the wings pulled back in a high-speed diving posture. The background is a soft atmospheric blur suggesting open sky.
foreground: large bird Pokemon in diving flight posture
